snippet.title: LIVE | [BM] MPL MY Season 17 Grand Finals
snippet.description:
Pentas Grand Finals MPL MY Season 17 hari ini bakal menjadi saksi pertembungan dua ideologi terbesar MLBB tanah air. SRG lawan VMS! 🏆🔥

Adakah takhta ini akan kekal dikawal oleh sang dinasti demi melengkapkan legasi 5-peat, atau generasi baharu bakal bangkit untuk melahirkan juara yang baharu? Satu piala, dua takdir, dan hanya satu pasukan akan bergelar pencipta sejarah!

snippet.title: LIVE | [BM] MPL MY Season 17 Playoffs Hari 2
snippet.description:
Hari kedua Playoffs MPL MY Season 17! 


Team Vamos bakal diuji! iG kini bersiap sedia untuk menyekat kemaraan VMS yang tengah membara dengan momentum kemenangan semalam. Adakah takhta iG bakal tergugat?


Seterusnya, tumpuan akan terarah kepada juara bertahan, SRG yang bakal menerima tentangan sengit daripada BTRM. BTRM datang dengan semangat membara, manakala SRG sedia mempertahankan kubu mereka.


Satu kelebihan buat yang menang untuk terus selesa di Upper Bracket Final, manakala yang kalah terpaksa akur turun ke Lower Bracket Semifinal untuk menggunakan talian hayat terakhir mereka. Siapakah yang bakal mendominasi perlawanan hari ini? Nantikan!


Khamis | 4 Jun 2026 
iG vs VMS - 3:00 PM
SRG vs BTRM - 7:00 PM 
📌 MPL MY S17 Playoffs Venue: Stadium Juara
🎪 Aktiviti Booth: 3 - 7 Jun 2026
🎙️ Aktiviti Pentas: 5 - 7 Jun 2026
🎟️ Pautan di bio

snippet.title: 🔴 LIVE | MPL ID S17 | Playoffs Hari 1 | Bahasa Indonesia
snippet.description:
Selamat datang di Hari Pertama Playoffs MPL ID Season 17! 🔥

Perjalanan menuju gelar juara resmi dimulai, dan tidak ada lagi ruang untuk kesalahan. Hari pertama Playoffs akan menghadirkan dua pertandingan krusial yang akan menentukan siapa yang tetap bertahan dan siapa yang harus mengakhiri perjalanannya lebih awal.

Pertandingan pertama akan mempertemukan GEEK Fam dan DEWA United Esports, dua tim yang berhasil membuktikan diri sepanjang Regular Season dan kini harus bertarung demi menjaga asa mereka menuju gelar juara.

Sementara itu, laga kedua akan menyajikan duel panas antara EVOS dan Bigetron Esports, dua organisasi besar yang memiliki sejarah panjang di MPL Indonesia. Dengan tekanan yang semakin besar, siapakah yang mampu bertahan dan melangkah lebih jauh?

Karena ini adalah Lower Bracket Round 1, tim yang kalah akan langsung tersingkir dari MPL ID S17. Tidak ada kesempatan kedua, tidak ada jalan kembali. Hanya tim terbaik yang akan terus melanjutkan perjalanan menuju puncak.

Saksikan setiap momen menegangkan, kejutan, dan perjuangan para tim dalam perebutan gelar juara MPL ID S17!

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Teaser | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby | Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais

► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

snippet.title: Whalefall | Official Teaser | In Theaters October 16
snippet.description:
The odds of being swallowed alive by a whale are not zero.

Watch the new teaser for #Whalefall and see the film only in theaters October 16.

Following the death of his father (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) goes diving off the central Coast of California in search of his remains, but is swallowed by a massive sperm whale. While trapped inside its belly with only one hour of oxygen left, Jay comes to realize that the hard-earned lessons his father imparted may be the key to his escape.

snippet.title: MPL TALK  MALAYSIA S17 GRANDFINALS : GOAT OF MPLMY
snippet.description:
Selepas sembilan minggu penuh dengan aksi, kejutan, perdebatan, dan pelbagai cerita menarik, tirai MPL MY Season 17 akhirnya melabuhkan tirainya.

Selangor Red Giants sekali lagi membuktikan dominasi mereka apabila berjaya mempertahankan kejuaraan dan mencipta fivepeat, selepas menewaskan Vamos dengan keputusan 4-0 di pentas Grand Final. Walaupun tewas di perlawanan akhir, Vamos tetap berjaya mengesahkan slot mereka ke Esports World Cup (EWC) Paris, sekaligus melengkapkan musim yang cukup cemerlang buat pasukan tersebut.

Dalam saingan Lower Bracket Final pula, Invictus Gaming terpaksa akur apabila tewas kepada Vamos, sekali gus menamatkan perjalanan mereka dalam musim yang penuh dengan prestasi memberangsangkan sebagai antara pasukan paling konsisten musim ini.

Minggu terakhir ini juga menyaksikan perjalanan beberapa pasukan playoff seperti BTRM, Team Rey, RRQ, Invictus Gaming, Vamos, dan Selangor Red Giants, yang telah memberikan aksi terbaik mereka sepanjang musim.

Dalam episod terakhir MPL Talk MY Season 17, sertai Abang Lord, Nevinne, Coach Rain, Mars, dan Sunfrost untuk mengimbau kembali detik-detik terbaik musim ini, membincangkan perjalanan setiap pasukan, serta menilai segala yang telah berlaku sepanjang MPL MY Season 17.

Terima kasih kepada semua yang sentiasa menyokong MPL Talk MY sepanjang musim ini.

snippet.title: Penat Tapi Kena Kuat - Duka Malam (Official Lyric Video) | Lagu Melayu Sedih 2026
snippet.description:
Penat tapi kena kuat bukan bermaksud kita kena tanggung semua sorang-sorang. Bila rasa terlalu letih sampai tak tahu nak bergantung pada siapa, ingatlah masih ada tuhan yang sentiasa bersama, walaupun kita sendiri tak mampu.

Kadang kita rasa lemah, rasa hampir jatuh, tapi sebenarnya dalam setiap ujian tu tuhan tak pernah tinggalkan kita. Dia bagi kita kekuatan yang kita sendiri tak sedar kita ada, sampai kita boleh terus bertahan walaupun rasa dah tak mampu.

Walau penat macam mana sekalipun, jangan putus harapan dan putus asa. Sebab bila kita hampir rebah, di situ tuhan sedang pegang kita. Dan setiap rasa sakit yang kita lalui, semuanya tak pernah sia-sia di sisi-Nya.

Teruskan walau perlahan, sebab selagi kita masih bergantung pada tuhan, kita tak pernah benar-benar sendiri.

#PenatTapiKuat #LaguBaru #NewMusicMalaysia #MalaySong #LaguSedih #SadSong #EmotionalSong #MusicMalaysia #FYP #FYPシ #ViralSong #SunoAI #IndependentArtist #MusicRelease #LirikMelayu #DeepVibes #Relatable #SpotifyMalaysia #PlaylistMalaysia

localized.title: Penat Tapi Kena Kuat - Duka Malam (Official Lyric Video) | Lagu Melayu Sedih 2026
localized.description:
Penat tapi kena kuat bukan bermaksud kita kena tanggung semua sorang-sorang. Bila rasa terlalu letih sampai tak tahu nak bergantung pada siapa, ingatlah masih ada tuhan yang sentiasa bersama, walaupun kita sendiri tak mampu.

Kadang kita rasa lemah, rasa hampir jatuh, tapi sebenarnya dalam setiap ujian tu tuhan tak pernah tinggalkan kita. Dia bagi kita kekuatan yang kita sendiri tak sedar kita ada, sampai kita boleh terus bertahan walaupun rasa dah tak mampu.

Walau penat macam mana sekalipun, jangan putus harapan dan putus asa. Sebab bila kita hampir rebah, di situ tuhan sedang pegang kita. Dan setiap rasa sakit yang kita lalui, semuanya tak pernah sia-sia di sisi-Nya.

Teruskan walau perlahan, sebab selagi kita masih bergantung pada tuhan, kita tak pernah benar-benar sendiri.

#PenatTapiKuat #LaguBaru #NewMusicMalaysia #MalaySong #LaguSedih #SadSong #EmotionalSong #MusicMalaysia #FYP #FYPシ #ViralSong #SunoAI #IndependentArtist #MusicRelease #LirikMelayu #DeepVibes #Relatable #SpotifyMalaysia #PlaylistMalaysia

snippet.title: James Arthur - Can I Be Him (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
james arthur - can i be him

thank you for spending a moment here with us. 
we hope the music brought you a little comfort.

feel free to subscribe if you felt the warmth of the music 🌟

· follow James Arthur:
spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/4IWBUUAFIplrNtaOHcJPRM?si=X7QmRhnTQFOVDKM-ElF5Dw
apple music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/james-arthur/193502798

lyrics:
[verse 1]
you walked into the room
and now my heart's been stolen
you took me back in time to when i was unbroken
now you're all i want
and i knew it from the very first moment
'cause a light came on when i heard that song
and i want you to sing it again

[chorus]
i swear that every word you sing
you wrote them for me
like it was a private show
but i know you never saw me
when the lights come on and i'm on my own
will you be there to sing it again?
could i be the one you talk about in all your stories?
can i be him?

[verse 2]
i heard there was someone but i know he don't deserve you
if you were mine i'd never let anyone hurt you
i wanna dry those tears, kiss those lips
it's all that i've been thinking about
'cause a light came on when i heard that song
and i want you to sing it again

[chorus]
i swear that every word you sing
you wrote them for me
like it was a private show
but i know you never saw me
when the lights come on and i'm on my own
will you be there to sing it again?
could i be the one you talk about in all your stories?

[bridge]
can i be the one?
can i be the one?
can i be the one?
oh, can i, can i be him?

[refrain]
won't you sing it again
oh, when you sing it again
can i be him
won't you sing it again
oh, when you sing it again
can i be him?

[chorus]
i swear that every word you sang
you wrote them for me
like it was a private show
but i know you never saw me
when the lights come on and i'm on my own
will you be there, will you be there
can i be the one you talk about in all your stories
can i be him
can i be him
can i be him
can i be him

#jamesarthur #canibehim
